Built around 'We Got You' as a multi-year initiative — NICU families, foster parents, parents with disabilities — with four pillars (lullabies, service program, adaptive product, Gen Z social), three investment tiers ($0.5M / $5–8M / $15–20M), and a May 2026 → March 2028 phased plan timed to the Cannes entry window. 4 asks need greenlight in next 30 days for timeline to hold.
